format.roundRobinOnlyDesc: Every player faces every other player. No playoffs, groups, or knockout.
format.roundRobinPlayoffsDesc: Round robin regular phase, then the top teams advance to playoffs.
format.groupsKnockoutDesc: Players are split into groups, then top qualifiers advance to a knockout bracket.
format.knockoutOnlyDesc: Players go directly into a single-elimination bracket.

phaseActions.hintGenerateRegularSeason: Generate the regular season fixture before creating playoffs.
phaseActions.hintPlayRegularSeason: Play all regular season matches before generating playoffs ({{count}} remaining).
phaseActions.hintPlayoffNotConfigured: Playoff qualification count is not configured for this tournament.
phaseActions.hintGenerateGroupStage: Generate the group stage fixture before creating the knockout bracket.
phaseActions.hintPlayGroupStage: Play all group stage matches before generating knockout ({{count}} remaining).
phaseActions.hintQualifiersNotConfigured: Qualifiers per group is not configured for this tournament.
phaseActions.knockoutOnlyStartHint: Starting the tournament generates the knockout bracket immediately.

format.description: Pick how matches will be structured for this tournament.

configure.noExtraConfig: No extra configuration is required for round robin.
configure.bracketAutoDetected_one: Auto-detected from {{count}} selected player. Smaller brackets are padded with BYEs when needed.
configure.bracketAutoDetected_other: Auto-detected from {{count}} selected players. Smaller brackets are padded with BYEs when needed.

review.description: Review your tournament settings before creating.
review.name: Name

narrative.notStartedNoPlayers: {{name}} has not started yet — no players or results on the board.
narrative.readyNoResults_one: {{name}} is ready to go with {{count}} player, waiting for the first results.
narrative.readyNoResults_other: {{name}} is ready to go with {{count}} players, waiting for the first results.
narrative.summaryFinished_one: {{name}} wrapped up with {{playerCount}} player, {{matchCount}} match played and {{goalPhrase}} scored.
narrative.summaryFinished_other: {{name}} wrapped up with {{playerCount}} players, {{matchCount}} matches played and {{goalPhrase}} scored.
narrative.summaryActive_one: {{name}} is underway with {{playerCount}} player, {{matchCount}} match played and {{goalPhrase}} scored.
narrative.summaryActive_other: {{name}} is underway with {{playerCount}} players, {{matchCount}} matches played and {{goalPhrase}} scored.
narrative.summaryOther_one: {{name}} has recorded with {{playerCount}} player, {{matchCount}} match played and {{goalPhrase}} scored.
narrative.summaryOther_other: {{name}} has recorded with {{playerCount}} players, {{matchCount}} matches played and {{goalPhrase}} scored.
narrative.championNotBegun: The title race has not begun — no champion can be crowned yet.
narrative.noClearLeader: {{name}} produced results, but no clear leader emerged from the standings.
narrative.championWithRunnerUp: {{champion}} lifted {{name}}, finishing on {{points}} points ({{record}}, {{goalLine}}) and holding off {{runnerUp}} for the crown.
narrative.championSolo: {{champion}} lifted {{name}}, finishing on {{points}} points with a {{record}} record and {{goalLine}}.
narrative.championLeading: {{champion}} leads {{name}} on {{points}} points ({{record}}, {{goalLine}}) as the standings favourite.
narrative.noSurprisesYet: No surprises yet — the tournament is still waiting for its first result.
narrative.biggestUpset: {{winner}} delivered the biggest shock, beating higher-ranked {{loser}} {{score}} against the standings grain.
narrative.mostWinsMiss: {{player}} won the most matches ({{count}}) yet still missed out on the title — the cruellest near-miss of {{name}}.
narrative.biggestWinDominant: {{winner}}'s {{score}} win over {{loser}} was the most dominant single result (+{{diff}}), even without taking the trophy.
narrative.favouritesHeld: The favourites largely held firm in {{name}} — no single result flipped the expected order.
narrative.scoringChartEmpty: The scoring chart is empty until the first goals go in.
narrative.goalsShared: No player separated themselves in the scoring charts — goals were shared around.
narrative.topScorer_one: {{player}} topped the scoring charts with 1 goal across {{matches}} match.
narrative.topScorer_other: {{player}} topped the scoring charts with {{goals}} goals across {{matches}} matches.
narrative.defensivePending: Defensive honours will be decided once the action starts.
narrative.noDefensiveStandout: No standout defensive record emerged from the results.
narrative.bestDefense_one: {{player}} led the defensive standings, conceding just 1 goal in {{matches}} match.
narrative.bestDefense_oneGoal_other: {{player}} led the defensive standings, conceding just 1 goal in {{matches}} matches.
narrative.bestDefense_other: {{player}} led the defensive standings, conceding just {{goals}} goals in {{matches}} matches.
